title: Saro´s Road Blocks
description: Adds asphalt with slope/stair variants, crash barriers, street lights, and road marking tools for building realistic roads, highways, and on-ramps.
body:
![header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Road_Blocks/BH_SaroRB_header.webp)

# Saro's Road Blocks Mod 🛣️

![over](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Road_Blocks/BH_SaroRB_overview.webp)

Saro's Road Blocks adds asphalt blocks with slope and stair variants — so you can build smooth hills, on-ramps, and bridges instead of stair-stepping — plus crash barriers, street lights, sidewalk blocks, and a dedicated set of road marking tools (brushes, planner, fill tool). Designed to pair with Saro's Road Signs. Supports Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge for Minecraft 1.19.4 through 1.21+

![features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Road_Blocks/BH_SaroRB_features.webp)

- **Asphalt Blocks and Slopes** 🛤️
  - Offers a comprehensive set of asphalt blocks, slopes, and road lines, perfect for detailed road construction.

- **Multiplayer and Survival Compatibility** 🌐
  - Designed to integrate seamlessly into multiplayer and survival gameplay environments.

- **Custom Content** 🎨
  - Includes unique sounds, models, and textures to create an authentic road-building experience.

- **Mod Compatibility** 🔄
  - Works well together with [Saro's Road Signs](https://modrinth.com/mod/saros-road-signs) to complete your road construction projects.

- **Content Packs** 📦 *(NEW in 5.0)*
  - Add your own custom road line textures by dropping a pack folder into `saros_road_blocks_mod/packs/` in your game directory.
  - Each pack defines its lines via a simple `pack.json` plus PNG textures (separate top/side/face textures supported).
  - Server syncs available pack metadata to clients automatically on join — clients only need the textures installed locally.
  - An example pack is auto-generated on first launch so you can see the format.
  - Available in: **1.20.1** (Forge / Fabric) and **1.21.1** (Forge / NeoForge / Fabric). Other versions keep the built-in line variants.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/OKSag30QKoo?si=-6fN7oKMHAGBK2tC" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![versions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Road_Blocks/BH_SaroRB_versions.webp)

### Currently Supported✅
- **Forge/NeoForge/Fabric 26.1**
- **Forge 1.21.11**
- **Forge 1.21.10**
- **Forge 1.21.9**
- **Forge 1.21.8**
- **Forge 1.21.7**
- **Forge 1.21.6**
- **Forge 1.21.5**
- **Forge 1.21.3**
- **Forge/NeoForge/Fabric 1.21.1**
- **Forge 1.21**
- **Forge 1.20.6**
- **Forge 1.20.4**
- **Forge/NeoForge 1.20.1**
- **Forge 1.19.4**
- **Fabric 1.20.1**

### Partially Discontinued⚠️
- **Forge 1.19.2**

### Discontinued❌
- **Forge 1.18.2**
- **Forge 1.16.5**
- **Quilt**

![join](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Road_Blocks/BH_SaroRB_support.webp)

For requests, suggestions, or bug reports, join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/H8a8CJe) and become part of the Saro's Mod community. We look forward to your feedback!

[![Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Road_Blocks/BH_SaroRB_promo.webp "Bisect Hosting")](https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php "Bisect Hosting")



**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
